text: Tell me about an ML project you built from scratch. What was the business problem?
Describe a time your model performed well offline but failed in production. What happened?
Tell me about a time you had to explain a complex model to a non-technical stakeholder.
Describe a situation where you discovered data leakage in your pipeline. How did you handle it?
Tell me about a time you had to choose between model accuracy and interpretability.
Describe a project where you had very limited or noisy data. How did you handle it?
Tell me about a time a stakeholder disagreed with your model's results. What did you do?
Describe a situation where you had to iterate on a model multiple times before it worked.
Tell me about your most challenging feature engineering task.
Describe a time when you had to defend your model evaluation methodology to a skeptical audience.
Tell me about a time you automated a data science workflow to save time.
Describe a situation where business requirements changed mid-project. How did you adapt?
Tell me about a time you had to balance model performance with computational cost.
Describe a project where you collaborated with engineers to deploy a model. What was your role?
Tell me about a mistake you made in a data science project and what you learned from it.
